title: Silky Korean Cheese Stir-fry
description: A fresh and silky post-workout dish featuring cheddar cheese in a diabetic-friendly version of traditional Korean dum banchan.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and ginger, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Add sliced Dum and cook for an additional minute until they start to soften slightly.
Pour water into the pan with the Dum and stir-fry for a couple more minutes, allowing the Dum to absorb some of the liquid.
Stir in shredded cheddar cheese. Sprinkle Korean red pepper flakes over the top if desired and continue stirring until the cheese melts completely and everything is well combined.
Serve immediately as a snack or appetizer.
